en.extract:
The large tree finch (Camarhynchus psittacula) is a species of bird in the Darwin's finch group of the tanager family Thraupidae.
It is endemic to the Galapagos Islands.

Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests.

The '''large tree finch''' ('''''Camarhynchus psittacula''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the [[Darwin's finch]] group of the [[tanager]] [[Family (taxonomy)|family]] [[Thraupidae]].
It is [[endemic]] to the [[Galapagos Islands]].
[[File:CamarhynchusHabeliPZSL1870.jpg|thumb|left]]
Its natural [[habitat]]s are subtropical or tropical dry [[forest]]s and subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s.

zh.extract:
大树雀（学名：Camarhynchus psittacula），是雀形目唐纳雀科的一种鸟类。
大树雀体重约18.7克，翼长约68.7毫米，嘴峰长约14.6毫米，喙宽度约5.7毫米，喙厚度约9.7毫米，跗蹠长约21.5毫米，尾长约41.1毫米。大树雀在其分布区内为留鸟，其栖息在密集的高大树木组成的森林中，食性为肉食性，主要食物来源是陆生无脊椎动物。


亚种
C. p. habeli：分布于加拉帕戈斯群岛的平塔岛和马切纳岛。
C. p. affinis：分布于加拉帕戈斯群岛的伊莎贝拉岛和费尔南迪纳岛。
C. p. psittacula：分布于加拉帕戈斯群岛的巴尔特拉岛、平松岛、聖菲島、圣克鲁斯岛、弗雷里安纳岛、拉维达岛、圣地亚哥岛。
